extra.reason: PAC infrastructure committed (8c03c6e), GHCR secret encrypted and committed (96aeed5), apko-cicd.kustomization.yaml uncommented (cbdcef5). All prerequisites met; Flux will deploy apko-cicd-ci on next reconcile.
PAT secrets removed in 38257ce; Flux will prune pac-github-token and github-webhook-secret from ocidex-ci namespace on next reconcile

Approach changed: instead of adding a PAT-backed secret, we modified tektonic to use PAC's ephemeral pac-gitauth-{uuid} secret via podTemplateEnv. The github-token.secret.template.yaml has been deleted. See ocidex commit 2f85812 and tektonic 1.1.0.

Fixed: root causes were (1) rogue nested .beads/.beads Dolt DB, (2) repos.additional multi-repo config, (3) beads version skew (0.42.0 vs 1.0.3) with mismatched daemons. Resolved by pinning beads=1.0.3 in common flox env, re-locking all repos, and pristine reinit-from-jsonl on a clean .beads. list/ready/show/stats/export now all consistent.
